endpoints.name: GET /aquifer-codes/demand/
endpoints.description: return a list of aquifer demand codes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifer-codes/materials/
endpoints.description: return a list of aquifer material codes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifer-codes/productivity/
endpoints.description: return a list of aquifer productivity codes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifer-codes/quality-concerns/
endpoints.description: return a list of quality concern codes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifer-codes/subtypes/
endpoints.description: return a list of aquifer subtype codes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifer-codes/vulnerability/
endpoints.description: return a list of aquifer vulnerability codes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifer-codes/water-use/
endpoints.description: return a list of water use codes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifers/
endpoints.description: return a list of aquifers
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifers/names/
endpoints.description: List all aquifers in a simplified format
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifers/{aquifer_id}/
endpoints.description: return details of aquifers
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{AQUIFER_ID}} with a real aquifer_id.

endpoints.name: GET /aquifers/{aquifer_id}/files
endpoints.description: list files found for the aquifer identified in the uri
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{AQUIFER_ID}} with a real aquifer_id.

endpoints.name: GET /cities/drillers/
endpoints.description: returns a list of cities with a qualified, registered operator (driller or installer)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /cities/installers/
endpoints.description: returns a list of cities with a qualified, registered operator (driller or installer)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /config
endpoints.description: serves general configuration
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /drillers/
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all person records
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /drillers/names/
endpoints.description: Search for a person in the Register
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /drillers/{person_guid}/files/
endpoints.description: list files found for the aquifer identified in the uri
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{PERSON_GUID}} with a real person_guid.

endpoints.name: GET /keycloak
endpoints.description: serves keycloak config
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /submissions/options/
endpoints.description: Options required for submitting activity report forms
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /surveys/
endpoints.description: returns a list of active surveys
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /wells/
endpoints.description: returns a list of wells
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /wells/tags/
endpoints.description: seach for wells by tag or owner
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /wells/{tag}/files
endpoints.description: list files found for the well identified in the uri
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{TAG}} with a real tag.

endpoints.name: GET /wells/{well_tag_number}
endpoints.description:
Return well detail.
This view is open to all, and has no permissions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY. Replace {{WELL_TAG_NUMBER}} with a real well_tag_number.
